who: field service managers in the construction industry managing 5–15 equipment units
offer: For field service managers in the construction industry processing 5–15 equipment units, inconsistent tracking causes unexpected maintenance costs. We generate automated weekly reports instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent tracking of equipment usage leads to unexpected maintenance costs.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for field service managers
Indie Hackers posts discussing similar workflows
DM outreach to field service managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and solutions
try_it: Let users try weekly report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy access
Default reminder schedules for maintenance tasks
Allow CSV import for existing equipment data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
